styles.css: & { position: relative; width: fit-content; } &::before { content: ''; width: 12px; height: 22px; background-color: var(--wp--preset--color--primary); position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 0; transform: translateY(-50%); clip-path: polygon(83% 0px, 100% 0px, 66.6% 100%, 0% 100%); } &::after { content: ''; width: 12px; height: 22px; background-color: var(--wp--preset--color--primary); position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 12px; transform: translateY(-50%); clip-path: polygon(33.3% 0px, 100% 0px, 17% 100%, 0% 100%); }
